name: Prakash
text: I walked into Nandini's class at YMCA Northwest three years ago not knowing what Ashtanga even was — I just needed something to help with my back pain. What I found was so much more than that. Nandini has this rare ability to meet you exactly where you are, whether you're fumbling through your first Sun Salutation or finally finding your breath in a posture you've been working on for months. Her grounding in the traditional lineage comes through in every class — there's a depth and intentionality to her teaching that you just don't find everywhere. Three years later I show up every week without fail, and I leave every class feeling more like myself.
